title: Inquisition (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Inquisition''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Inquisitorius]]''', a division of [[Force-sensitive]] [[Dark side of the Force|dark side]] users that served under [[Darth Sidious]] and [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]], and were tasked with hunting down the [[Jedi]] and locating Force-sensitive infants.

==Legends==
*'''[[Inquisition]]''', during the [[Pius Dea Era]]
*'''[[Sith Inquisitor]]s''', of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]
*'''[[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]]''', a secret division of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]

==Wookieepedia==
*[[Wookieepedia:Inquisitorius|'''Inquisitorius''']], a review panel dedicated to maintaining the [[Wookieepedia:Featured article nominations|Featured article nominations]] page

{{Disambig}}
